t.t-value: [('pending', lang.get('pending', 'Order Placed')),('assigned', lang.get('assigned', 'Driver Assigned')),('in_transit', lang.get('in_transit', 'On the Way')),('delivered', lang.get('delivered', 'Delivered'))]
state_order.index(delivery.state) if delivery.state in state_order else -1

div.t-attf-class: tl-dot #{'done' if idx < current_idx else 'current' if idx == current_idx else ''}
tl-label #{'done' if idx < current_idx else 'active' if idx == current_idx else ''}
